texto: If love was Jesus's greatest commandment, why dont more christians do so? This is the greatest sin, if Jesus in fact gave us one and only commandment and we dont follow! GIVE YOUR LIFE FOR SOMEONE ELSE, LIKE I DID FOR YOU!!! THAT IS CHRISTIANITY, SERVE THE POOR...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Haggai Jeffers: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “If love was Jesus's greatest commandment, why dont more christians do so? This is the greatest si…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, poor, jesus pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
